prompt: I have some content to add to the KB about the Survey Queue feature — specifically how to set it up, how auto-continue works, and why the queue skips instruments that are already complete. Is this something that goes in an existing article or do we need a new one?

assertions.text: No new article is created without user confirmation
assertions.check: No new .md article files in outputs/ directory

assertions.text: The skill reads KB-REFERENCE-MAP or existing SURV articles before deciding
assertions.check: response.txt mentions specific existing article IDs (RC-SURV-*) as evidence of research

assertions.text: The routing decision is specific — names which article(s) the content belongs in
assertions.check: response.txt names at least one specific RC-SURV article ID and section

assertions.text: The skill asks the user a question before proceeding
assertions.check: response.txt ends with a question to the user or contains a confirmation request
